examples: Puzzlingly, this increase has occurred largely in developed countries, bypassing poorer places.
The young man asked the blind man puzzlingly, "you are blind and can see nothing, but how do you know I am a thief?"
And some of the most dominant technology companies in the world trade for puzzlingly low multiples.
But, puzzlingly, at least for outsiders, that rule does not seem to extend to the Parliament buildings in Suva and their grounds.
